allow: Bash(rm -f /tmp/pino-filter-debug.log; timeout 6 npx tsx smoke-pino-pretty-plus-filter.mjs 2>&1 | head -10; echo "--- debug log ---"; cat /tmp/pino-filter-debug.log 2>&1 | head -30)

Bash(rm -f /tmp/pino-filter-debug.log /d/Projects/tikka-spice-dashboard/server/logs/pretty-plus-filter*; timeout 6 npx tsx smoke-pino-pretty-plus-filter.mjs 2>&1 | head -10; echo "--- debug ---"; cat /tmp/pino-filter-debug.log 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo "--- file ---"; cat /d/Projects/tikka-spice-dashboard/server/logs/pretty-plus-filter*.log 2>/dev/null | head -5)
Bash(rm -f logs/master.*.log logs/application.*.log logs/warn.*.log logs/error.*.log logs/debug.*.log 2>&1; ls logs/*.log 2>&1 | head -3)
Bash(rm -f smoke-pino*.mjs pino-filter-debug.log && ls smoke-pino*.mjs pino-filter-debug.log 2>&1)
